title: trichomanes malabaricum
intro: Trichomanes malabaricum, also known as the Malabar maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Trichomanes malabaricum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. In herbal preparations, Trichomanes malabaricum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
